title: Food • Planet • Health Webinar
description: Successfully completed the Food • Planet • Health webinar focused on sustainable nutrition, environmental awareness, and healthy lifestyle choices.

story.why: I joined this webinar to understand how nutrition, health and environmental sustainability are connected.
story.learned: Healthy nutrition habits, sustainable food choices and environmental awareness.
story.experience: The webinar provided practical insights into making healthier lifestyle choices while contributing positively to the environment.
story.impact: It encouraged me to become more conscious about sustainability and personal health.

title: ROBO Race - CognizanceX'26
description: Actively participated in the ROBO Race technical event organized under CognizanceX'26, demonstrating teamwork, problem-solving, and technical skills.

story.why: I wanted to participate in a robotics competition and challenge my technical abilities.
story.learned: Robotics concepts, teamwork, problem solving and competitive thinking.
story.experience: Working with a team in a competitive environment helped me improve both technical and communication skills.
story.impact: The event increased my confidence in participating in future technical competitions.

title: C2C 1.0 Volunteer
description: Served as a dedicated volunteer for the Concept to Creation (C2C 1.0) event, contributing to the successful execution and management of activities.

story.why: I wanted to gain experience in event management and contribute to an innovation-focused event.
story.learned: Leadership, communication, teamwork and event coordination.
story.experience: Working behind the scenes taught me how successful events are organized and executed.
story.impact: This experience improved my confidence and professional communication skills.

title: TATA Crucible Campus Quiz 2025
description: Participated in the TATA Crucible Campus Quiz 2025, enhancing general knowledge, analytical thinking, and competitive aptitude.

story.why: I wanted to test my knowledge and improve my analytical thinking abilities.
story.learned: Business awareness, current affairs, logical thinking and competitive aptitude.
story.experience: The quiz challenged me to think quickly and exposed me to a wide range of topics.
story.impact: It motivated me to stay updated with business, technology and world affairs.

title: Programming & Website Development Course
description: Successfully completed the Programming & Website Development Course (120 Hours) covering C Programming, HTML, CSS, C++, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Python Programming, MS SQL, and Web Development fundamentals with an overall B Grade.

story.why: I wanted to build a strong foundation in programming and web development.
story.learned: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, SQL, Bootstrap, C and C++.
story.experience: This was one of the most valuable courses in my learning journey because it transformed theoretical knowledge into practical development skills.
story.impact: This course inspired me to create real-world projects including my portfolio website and college website.

title: Basics of Robotics
description: Successfully completed the Basics of Robotics course authorized by Siemens and offered through Coursera.

story.why: I enrolled in this course to understand the fundamentals of robotics and explore how automation is transforming modern industries.
story.learned: Robot fundamentals, industrial automation concepts, robotic systems, applications of robotics in manufacturing and real-world automation techniques.
story.experience: The course provided a strong introduction to robotics concepts through practical examples and industry-focused learning materials.
story.impact: This certification strengthened my interest in robotics, automation and electrical engineering while enhancing my technical knowledge for future projects.

title: Youth Speak Forum 2025
description: Received a Certificate of Participation for actively participating in AIESEC's Youth Speak Forum 2025, contributing to discussions on leadership, youth empowerment, and global challenges.

story.why: I participated in Youth Speak Forum 2025 to interact with young leaders, gain new perspectives, and understand how youth can contribute to solving global challenges.
story.learned: Leadership skills, communication techniques, problem-solving approaches, teamwork, and the importance of youth involvement in social impact initiatives.
story.experience: The event provided an inspiring environment where I connected with like-minded individuals, attended engaging sessions, and explored innovative ideas for creating positive change.
story.impact: This experience boosted my confidence, expanded my professional network, and motivated me to take a more active role in leadership and community development activities.

title: Basic Electronics
issuer: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) & Coursera
description: Successfully completed the Basic Electronics course authorized by Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani and offered through Coursera.

story.why: As an Electrical Engineering student, I wanted to strengthen my understanding of electronic components and circuit fundamentals.
story.learned: Electronic components, circuit analysis, voltage and current concepts, semiconductor basics, and practical electronics applications.
story.experience: The course provided a solid foundation in electronics through structured lessons and practical examples, helping me connect theory with real-world applications.
story.impact: This certification enhanced my electronics knowledge and prepared me for advanced electrical engineering subjects, robotics, automation, and hardware-based projects.

title: Introduction to Generative AI
description: Successfully completed the Introduction to Generative AI course authorized by Google Cloud and offered through Coursera.

story.why: I enrolled in this course to understand the fundamentals of Generative AI and explore how AI technologies are transforming industries and everyday life.
story.learned: Core concepts of Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), AI applications, machine learning fundamentals, and responsible AI practices.
story.experience: The course provided a beginner-friendly introduction to Generative AI through real-world examples and practical insights from Google Cloud experts.
story.impact: This certification strengthened my understanding of modern AI technologies and inspired me to explore AI-powered solutions alongside my Electrical Engineering studies.
